title: Shrinkr – Serverless URL Shortener
description: A fully serverless URL shortener supporting custom aliases, QR code generation, and scalable link redirection.
longDescription: Shrinkr is a production-ready, serverless URL shortening platform designed for scalability and zero infrastructure management. It supports custom short links, QR code generation, and seamless redirection using AWS-managed services.
features: QR code generation for shortened links

title: MemeCasso – AI Meme Bot
description: An autonomous AI-powered bot that understands post context and replies with relevant memes without manual intervention.
longDescription: MemeCasso is an AI-driven bot built for Bluesky that analyzes post context, generates captions using generative AI, and responds with relevant memes automatically. The system combines a Node.js daemon with a Flask backend for AI processing.
features: Automated replies to social media posts
Backend image generation using ImageFlip API
Fully autonomous, no manual moderation required

title: Paathshala – E-Learning Platform
description: A full-stack e-learning platform with course purchases, progress tracking, and automated notifications.
longDescription: Paathshala is a learning management platform that enables users to browse courses, purchase content, track progress, and receive automated email notifications. It is built with a scalable backend and modern frontend architecture.
